events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: fire alarm devices & circuits, missing end-of-line resistor, tested/inspected stage. NFPA 72 requires end-of-line resistors on SLC/NAC circuits for supervision. Missing EOL resistor means the circuit is not properly supervised, would cause trouble signal or fail to monitor integrity. This is non-compliant and defective. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Fire alarm circuits unsupervised is critical life safety. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 90. Value 0. Confidence high.
